n: Dâr Narbugud: The Heart of the Scourge

steps.t: Celeborn is in Caras Galadhon, at the heart of Lothlórien. You should speak with Celeborn at the behest of Baranglim to gain his counsel about the fin…
Dâr Narbugud is in the Foundations of Stone in Moria, to the south-east near the Dark Delvings. Celeborn has given you a phial of Elven light to bring…
